title: portulaca costata
intro: Portulaca costata, also known as the fan portulaca or fanleaf purslane, is a species of flowering plant in the family Portulacaceae. This succulent plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help soothe skin irritations and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Portulaca costata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antibacterial properties, making it a popular choice for natural remedies. Portulaca costata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used topically to treat skin conditions such as eczema and wounds.
